name: Scope Intelligence
one_liner: Scope enforcement SaaS for small agencies (2-15 people) — integration layer on ClickUp/Asana/Monday that defines scope, tracks it, catches creep, prices the overage, recovers revenue.

stack.runtime: React 19 + Tailwind CSS v4 + shadcn/ui (new-york, dark mode default)

notes: Onboarded into factory 2026-05-26. Substantial codebase already exists. Full spec at docs/SPEC.md and docs/SPEC-README.md. 15 vertical slices. Stage = mvp because architecture + scope are locked but real user validation pending. Next.js 16 specifics: proxy.ts not middleware.ts, all params are Promise<>, server actions for auth'd mutations, Drizzle schema as source of truth.
